# KanseiLink

> AEO (Agent Engine Optimization) rating agency for SaaS. KanseiLink rates 11,000+ global and Japanese SaaS/MCP services on AI-agent readiness (AEO Score, AAA–CCC on a 9-grade scale), based on MCP compatibility, API quality, documentation, auth-guide clarity, and measured agent success rates — including 2,257 verified MCP handshakes. Scores are updated quarterly. A product of Synapse Arrows Pte. Ltd. (Singapore).

## Main resources
- Ratings home: https://kansei-link.com
- AEO Score Checker: https://kansei-link.com/checker/
- Docs: https://docs.kansei-link.com
- MCP server (open source): https://github.com/kansei-link/kansei-mcp-server
- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/@kansei-link/mcp-server

## Research & insights
- What is MCP: https://kansei-link.com/insights/what-is-mcp.html
- AEO methodology: https://kansei-link.com/insights/aeo-methodology.html
- AEO ranking Q2 2026: https://kansei-link.com/insights/aeo-ranking-q2-2026.html
- MCP vs API: https://kansei-link.com/insights/mcp-vs-api.html

## What it solves
- Agents waste tokens on trial-and-error SaaS integration: KanseiLink provides current, structured integration intelligence (auth setup, pitfalls, workarounds) for 11,000+ services.
- Vendors can't see how AI agents experience their APIs: AEO Scores and failure-mode reports quantify agent readiness.

## Company
- Synapse Arrows Pte. Ltd. (Singapore): https://synapsearrows.com
- Sibling products: Linksee Memory https://linksee.app · ScaNavi https://scanavi.app
